title.en: It's just that the ascension of Yuanhai is not ...

content.en:
"The development of Yuanhai is getting better and better!"

Ye Tian was naturally very happy about this big improvement of Yuanhai, after all, this was his hometown, and he naturally looked forward to his hometown getting better and better.

It's just that the ascension of Yuanhai is not helpful to him.

Nowadays, there are very few opportunities that will be useful to him.

"Let's go to Moshan!"

Ye Tian remembered the ruins of Moshan not far from the source sea.

Among the ruins of Moshan, there is also a prison of Mo1L, on which many legendary lords are imprisoned.

Previously, he had also obtained the Eternal Treasure on the prisoners of Moshan, that is, the Mixed Yuan Order.

Moshan used to be a very good force in the Infinite Sea, and its strength was stronger than that of the Strange Star Tower, with three Legendary Realm Lords there, but it was a pity that Moshan had no backer, and in a great war, two of the three Legendary Realm Lords of Moshan were missing, and the remaining one was missing.

And the huge power of Moshan collapsed and became history. 08，

This time it can be regarded as a revisit, by the way, to see if there are good things in the ruins of Moshan.

One step by step, Ye Tian came to the ruins of Moshan.

Even if he has now become a Legendary Lord of the Transcendent Realm, it is difficult for him to destroy the prison of Moshan, just because this is the arrangement of the Legendary Realm Lord of Moshan, otherwise, it will not always exist today.

Of course.

With Ye Tian's ability to control time, there is no problem in entering and exiting the Moshan Prison freely, after all, this prison is now uncontrolled, and he can't be stopped.

I saw Ye Tian's gaze pass through the prisons, and suddenly his gaze fixed on one of the women.

"Raincoat Lord!"

He remembered that he had asked the raincoat lord about something before, and the raincoat lord had told him a lot of information in order to save his life.

This woman is not numb like other legendary lords, but she still maintains the hope of survival, and her will is still quite strong.

At this moment, Ye Tian looked at the raincoat lord, his eyes passed through time, and he saw the scenes of her past.

"Immeasurable Sea, people of the Su family!"

The Su family, like the Qin family in the Infinite Sea, is also a big force, the Su family is even more powerful than the Qin family, with three half-step Legendary Realm Lords and more than twenty Transcendent Realm Legendary Lords.

In a certain circle, the Su family is still quite famous.

But for Ye Tian today, the Su family is nothing.

And the raincoat lord is the heir of a legendary lord of the Origin Realm of the Su family, but unfortunately he offended Moshan, was caught, and imprisoned here.

Although the Su family knew, they couldn't save the raincoat lord, and now they naturally didn't know that the raincoat lord was here.

Besides, the status of the raincoat lord in the Su family is not high, he is just an immortal realm lord.

And the raincoat collar - Yu knew that the Su family could not save himself, so he did not count on the Su family.

"Forget it, you answered some doubts to me at the beginning, so I'll save you. "

㓚天 said.

The main reason is that he didn't see any bad deeds of the raincoat lord in the past, but he just killed a disciple of Moshan who had a bad reputation, and he was caught and imprisoned by Moshan.

Strictly speaking, this thing is Moshan's fault.

Wow!

Ye Tian stepped into the prison and came to the front of the raincoat lord.

When the raincoat lord saw Ye Tian, he was immediately surprised: "Endless Lord!"

The raincoat lord was surprised that Ye Tian had actually come here, she didn't seem to have seen Ye Tian for a long time.

And.

Ye Tian had already reached the realm of the Legendary Lord, why could he still enter this prison where the Immortal Realm Lord was imprisoned?

"Raincoat Lord, do you want to go out?

Ye Tian asked with a smile.

"Think!" The raincoat lord hurriedly thought of the horror of the Moshan Prison, and said in frustration: "The Moshan Prison was built by the Moshan Legendary Realm Lord, except for the Legendary Realm Lord, who can save me?"

Legendary Realm Lord, what a powerful existence it is.

Even the Su family behind her is just an ant in front of the Legendary Realm Lord, and she is only an ant in the Su family, which is not worth mentioning.

"Since you want to go out, I'll take you out!"

Ye Tian grabbed the raincoat lord and crossed to leave

Suddenly, regular chains appeared in the prison, and when he saw these regular chains, the raincoat lord's expression changed.

Whenever she tried to break out of this prison, the chains of rules would fall, and she had no power to resist.

"Shattered!"

Ye Tian directly shattered these rules with a bang, and the endless space-time directly stopped.

He easily walked out of the prison with the raincoat lord.

When the raincoat lord appeared in the outside world and confirmed that it was not a hallucination, he was overjoyed.

"Thank you, Endless Lord!"

The raincoat lord thanked.

"Let's go, I'm just trying to get you out for the sake of answering my doubts in the past. "

Ye Tian waved his hand.

The raincoat lord thanked him again and again, and then said goodbye to Ye Tian and left.

Saving the raincoat lord was just a casual thing, Ye Tian didn't care too much, and then he continued to spy on this prison, where there was even a transcendent realm legendary lord imprisoned.

However, Ye Tian had no idea of communicating with the other party.

The entrance to Moshan's prison seems to be on the stone tablet on the ground, as if these prisons are all separate, but now in Ye Tian's eyes, these prisons are all stacked layer by layer, and they are actually connected together.

The prison of the Immortal Realm Lord is outside, the prison of the Legendary Realm Lord is in the depths, and the prison of the Legendary Lord of the Transcendent Realm is even deeper.

However, there are also the deepest prisons.

And in the deepest prison of 147, Ye Tian saw a door.

"Hey, I just came to take a look, thinking that there was no gain, but I didn't expect it to be a chance?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

He walked into the deepest prison and came to the door.

This gate and the prison are integrated, it must have been built by the legendary realm lord of Moshan, and it connects the unknown land.

Ye Tian opened the door and walked in.

In a small world, a corpse sat there, and the aura emanating from its body made Ye Tian recognize his identity.

Lord of the Legendary Realm!

"Moshan, Lord of the Legendary Realm - Lord of Mofeng!"

Ye Tian heard that this Legendary Realm Lord had fallen in the fall of Moshan, but he didn't expect to die here

"It seems that Lord Mofeng didn't really escape, but escaped with serious injuries, but his injuries were too serious to live, and he came here before he died, and arranged all these billions" Ye Tian muttered.

At that moment, a voice echoed through the void.

"The person who came should be a certain Legendary Realm Lord, my wealth and some treasures of Moshan are here, you can take them. But I only have one request, and that is to hope that this Legendary Realm Lord will avenge our Moshan and kill the traitor of Moshan, the Lord of Blackwater. "

The sound soon stopped abruptly. _
